title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 10 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 10 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 10 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/09/2024
Today, iron ore ﬂuctuated upward and plunged at the close. The most-traded contract I2501 finally settled at 675 yuan/mt, dropping 0.07%throughout the day. Traders were fairly active in oﬄoading their stocks.
